languages.text: "Исключено". {n}Визор Паскаля сверкает алым.{/n} "Совместная работа с генетором Фебрусом оценивается мной как контрпродуктивная. Его готовность искажать догму ради оправдания собственных изъянов опасно граничит с ересью".

"Unthinkable." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "I assess collaboration with Genetor Februs to be counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."
languages.original_text: "Исключено". {n}Визор Паскаля сверкает алым.{/n} "Совместная работа с генетором Фебрусом оценивается мной как контрпродуктивная. Его готовность искажать догму ради оправдания собственных изъянов опасно граничит с ересью".

traits.locale_text: "Out of the question." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "Collaboration with Genetor Februs I assess as counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."

"Unthinkable." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "I assess collaboration with Genetor Februs to be counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."

languages.text: "Undenkbar." {n}Pasqals Visor blinkt rot.{/n} "Ich erachte eine Kollaboration mit Genetor Februs als kontraproduktiv. Seine Bereitschaft, Dogmen zu beugen, um seine eigenen Fehler zu rechtfertigen, grenzt gefährlich an Ketzerei."
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "I assess collaboration with Genetor Februs to be counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."

traits.locale_text: "Undenkbar." {n}Pasqals Visor blinkt rot.{/n} "Ich erachte eine Kollaboration mit Genetor Februs als kontraproduktiv. Seine Bereitschaft, Dogmen zu beugen, um seine eigenen Fehler zu rechtfertigen, grenzt gefährlich an Ketzerei."

languages.text: « C'est impensable. » {n}La visière de Pasqal émet un clignotement rouge.{/n} « Je considère qu'une collaboration avec le genetor Februs serait contre-productive. Sa propension à déformer le dogme pour justifier ses propres défauts frôle dangereusement l'hérésie. »
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "I assess collaboration with Genetor Februs to be counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."

traits.locale_text: « C'est impensable. » {n}La visière de Pasqal émet un clignotement rouge.{/n} « Je considère qu'une collaboration avec le genetor Februs serait contre-productive. Sa propension à déformer le dogme pour justifier ses propres défauts frôle dangereusement l'hérésie. »

languages.text: “简直荒谬。”{n}帕斯卡的目镜闪过一抹猩红。{/n}“我判定与费布鲁斯基因士合作只会适得其反。他为掩饰自身缺陷而不惜歪曲教义，这种行径十分危险，已近似于异端。”
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "I assess collaboration with Genetor Februs to be counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."

traits.locale_text: “简直荒谬。”{n}帕斯卡的目镜闪过一抹猩红。{/n}“我判定与费布鲁斯基因士合作只会适得其反。他为掩饰自身缺陷而不惜歪曲教义，这种行径十分危险，已近似于异端。”

languages.text: «Impensable». {n}El visor de Pasqal se vuelve carmesí.{/n} «Calculo que la colaboración con el genetor Februs será contraproducente. Su disposición a distorsionar el dogma para justificar sus defectos raya peligrosamente en la herejía».
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "I assess collaboration with Genetor Februs to be counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."

traits.locale_text: «Impensable». {n}El visor de Pasqal se vuelve carmesí.{/n} «Calculo que la colaboración con el genetor Februs será contraproducente. Su disposición a distorsionar el dogma para justificar sus defectos raya peligrosamente en la herejía».

languages.text: 「考えられない」{n}パスカルのバイザーが真紅に輝く。{/n}「ジェネター・フェブラスとの協力は逆効果だ。自分の欠点を正当化するために教義を歪めようとする彼の姿勢は、危険なほど異端に近い。」
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "I assess collaboration with Genetor Februs to be counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."

traits.locale_text: 「考えられない」{n}パスカルのバイザーが真紅に輝く。{/n}「ジェネター・フェブラスとの協力は逆効果だ。自分の欠点を正当化するために教義を歪めようとする彼の姿勢は、危険なほど異端に近い。」

languages.text: "Düşünülemez." {n}Pasqal'ın vizörü, kızıl renkte parlıyor.{/n} "Genetör Februs ile iş birliğini verimsiz buluyorum. Kendi kusurlarını haklı çıkarmak için dogmayı çarpıtmaya olan istekliliği, kâfirliğe tehlikeli bir şekilde yaklaşıyor."
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "I assess collaboration with Genetor Februs to be counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."

traits.locale_text: "Düşünülemez." {n}Pasqal'ın vizörü, kızıl renkte parlıyor.{/n} "Genetör Februs ile iş birliğini verimsiz buluyorum. Kendi kusurlarını haklı çıkarmak için dogmayı çarpıtmaya olan istekliliği, kâfirliğe tehlikeli bir şekilde yaklaşıyor."
